who: logistics coordinators for Amazon sellers processing 50–100 shipments/month
offer: For logistics coordinators for Amazon sellers processing 50–100 shipments/month, manual label generation causes late orders. We automate shipping label creation and tracking updates instead of manual label creation and tracking updates through Amazon Seller Central.
problem: Manual generation of shipping labels and tracking updates is time-consuming.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics coordinators
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics coordinators with demo video
Community forums for logistics coordinators sharing tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for label generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
